name: directory layout: G-12 validator rejects an unrecognized top-level folder (e.g. `random-vendor/`) not matching the 14 defaults or _operator/_community/_meta
command: mkdir -p tree && for ns in google _operator _community _meta random-vendor; do mkdir -p tree/$ns; done && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree"
